Wide table fixture

A phased plan with a single-character first column — the case where a clipped left edge is most visible.

PhaseShipsUser-visible?Gate to advance
0Header extraction + provider-neutral structNo (additive)Headers round-trip into thread_metadata
1Deterministic credibility factsNo (logged)Unit tests per signal green
2Credibility verdict folded into the enricher LLM passNo (logged)Verdict parsed; no category regression
